workContext.summary: Isabel is a collaborator on the LoveFlix project (under BookiStudios), working alongside founder Adrien. She is focused on integrating Notion for workflow and note-sharing, and recently investigated connecting the assistant to Notion via Notion MCP (OAuth).

topOfMind.summary: Interested in LoveFlix project; actively exploring connecting the assistant to Notion for workflow integration. Wants to set up a dedicated Notion folder for LoveFlix notes to be referenced by Adrien and his AI agent. Recently investigated Notion MCP (Hosted MCP Server with OAuth) as a potential connection method. Continues to refine the assistant's understanding of her identity (recently corrected assistant who assumed she was Adrien).

recentMonths.summary: Isabel is involved with LoveFlix development, focusing on marketing and workflow integration. Previously explored connecting the assistant to Notion for note-sharing with Adrien. Now investigating Notion MCP (Hosted MCP Server with OAuth) as a method to connect the assistant to Notion pages. She wants a dedicated LoveFlix folder where the assistant can output notes and ideas for easy reference by Adrien and his AI agent.

facts.content: Isabel wants to connect the assistant to Notion for workflow integration.
The assistant incorrectly assumed the user was Adrien; user corrected that they are Isabel.
facts.sourceError: Assistant assumed user was Adrien based on previous memory.

facts.content: Isabel wants to set up a dedicated Notion folder for LoveFlix notes that can be referenced by Adrien and his AI agent.
The assistant again incorrectly assumed the user was Adrien in this conversation; user corrected that they are Isabel.
facts.sourceError: Assistant saw 'LoveFlix' and assumed user was Adrien, but user is Isabel.

facts.content: Isabel wants to connect the assistant to Notion using Notion's MCP (Hosted MCP Server with OAuth) for LoveFlix note-sharing.
Isabel wants a dedicated Notion folder for LoveFlix where the assistant can output notes and ideas that can be easily referenced by Adrien and his AI agent.
